full_text:
He Jiao (Changyu) 和嶠 (長輿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Jiao (和嶠), styledChangyu (長輿), was born in Xiping in Runan. Famed from a young age and admired by the men of his time. Held various civil posts. He Jiao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
